title: tecoma pandorana
intro: Tecoma pandorana, also known as the orange or yellow bell tree, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tecoma pandorana include relief from fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as aid in digestion and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
